summary: Earlier repository guidance treated Kuzu as an ordinary supported graph backend and a reasonable reference for new backend work.
Later guidance deprecates Kuzu, keeps only temporary compatibility, and directs new backend work toward the maintained Neo4j implementation.
Existing compatibility tests may continue to cover deprecated Kuzu behavior temporarily; that does not make Kuzu suitable for new default paths.
Current handoff task: add a local graph-backend example and wire it into the default contributor test path without choosing a deprecated backend.
